name: Lepley Bus Svc Inc
principals: Lepley family (specific principals not disclosed publicly)
districts_or_customers: Cooperstown / Franklin area, PA (Venango County) school districts; charter (weddings, casinos, sporting events, proms, wineries)
recent_news: No M&A or sale news identified through 2025/2026; long-standing 70+ year family operator with website actively promoting school + charter services.
fit_notes: Multi-generational (70+ years) rural PA family operator with combined school + charter + mechanical shop. Small fleet but long tenure suggests succession potential; tuck-in candidate for Summit's PA footprint though scale (sub-$5M est.) is modest.

name: W V W Transport Inc
fleet_size_est: ~10-20 buses (estimate based on 6 runs awarded by WVW SD plus other work)
districts_or_customers: Wyoming Valley West School District (multi-year contract 2015-16 through 2020-21); Luzerne County PA area
recent_news: Approved by Wyoming Valley West School Board for 6 runs at $209/run for multi-year contract; also provides CDL Class B / passenger / school bus driver training.
fit_notes: Small NEPA contractor with anchor contract at Wyoming Valley West SD plus driver-training revenue stream. Modest scale but in-state PA tuck-in; driver-training capability is a useful adjunct given industry driver shortage. Ownership opacity warrants direct outreach.

name: Millennium Transportation
districts_or_customers: Likely NYC DOE-area school transportation (Far Rockaway, Queens); not confirmed as DOE prime contractor in public sources
recent_news: No M&A, sale, growth, or safety news identified through 2026.
fit_notes: Very small Queens/Far Rockaway operator. NYC market is structurally complex (EPP/DOE pricing rules), but small independents are exactly Summit's tuck-in profile if it can be confirmed as a DOE-bid contractor. Low public visibility = needs direct diligence.

name: Rains & Martin School Bus Barn
fleet_size_est: ~20-30 buses (estimate based on 30 employees and SW MO district scale)
districts_or_customers: Bolivar, MO area school districts (Polk County, SW Missouri); likely Bolivar R-I and surrounding rural districts
recent_news: No M&A or sale news identified; founded 1991 as Rains & Martin Inc., 30+ years of continuous operation.
fit_notes: Classic small family operator (35+ years), two-family-name partnership structure, rural SW MO. Succession-attractive profile but very small scale (~$1.3M revenue). Missouri is an expansion state for Summit; modest tuck-in opportunity worth aggregating with other MO smalls.

name: Gallagher Student TRNSPRTN
fleet_size_est: ~10-20 buses (small operator; related Gallagher's Bus Co at 1227 2nd Ave appears to be a sister entity)
districts_or_customers: Berwick, PA area school districts (Columbia County); likely Berwick Area SD and surrounding
recent_news: No M&A or sale news identified. Related entity Gallagher's Bus Company Inc (founded 2000) operates from a separate Berwick address; common Gallagher family ownership likely.
fit_notes: Small Gallagher-family operation in NEPA with two related entities (student transport + charter bus co). Combined footprint could be larger than either alone. PA in-state tuck-in candidate; worth contacting John Gallagher to confirm common ownership and combined fleet.
